title: Introduce pkg retry logic in win installer verify task
body:
Recent intermittent connectivity failures to the chocolatey repo caused a number of jobs to fail. This PR improves the robustness of the task in case this happens in the future.

```release-note
NONE
```

[NO NEW TESTS NEEDED]

The Fedora-36 root and rootless host tests both failed due to timing out after 90 minutes.  I don't think these changes should have caused that, so I've rerun them.

Changes LGTM once the tests are happy
